notes: Fix: scrolled values overlapping sticky cells on the projection page. Sticky cells (current-month column header, and the Total Income / Total Expenses / Net Surplus / Savings-EOM row headers) had semi-transparent backgrounds, so content scrolling underneath showed through. Causes: (1) legacy .budget-grid tr.subtotal/surplus-row/residual rules used rgba(...,0.03) and accent-soft (10% alpha) backgrounds — made opaque (var(--bg-elevated)). The table has both .proj-table and .budget-grid classes; the legacy rules came later in source so they won. (2) current-month thead cell used var(--accent-soft) directly — now uses opaque surface-sticky-head base + accent tint via inset box-shadow. (3) current-month tbody cell given explicit opaque base bg under its inset tint.
